request.request: Which review action most directly addresses the recorded verification state, and why?

responses.output_text: {"schemaVersion":"taxalens-verification-analyst-output:v1.2.0","requestKind":"next_review_action","campaign":{"campaignId":"verification-agent-quality-campaign-v1","title":"Verification analyst quality campaign","target":{"acceptedTaxonKey":"gbif:1938069","scientificName":"Papilio demoleus"}},"recommendation":{"action":"adjudication","basis":"unresolved_review_conflict","nextItemIds":["commons-papilio-demoleus-open-wing"],"why":"One recorded reviewer disagreement remains unresolved, so an independent adjudication directly addresses the current decision blocker while preserving both source reviews.","artifactIds":["verification-campaign-manifest","verification-item-manifest","verification-event-ledger","verification-consensus","verification-quality-before","verification-quality-after","provider-support-goal-verification"]},"qualityChange":null,"campaignAnalysis":null,"evidenceBackedClaims":[{"id":"unresolved-conflict","claim":"The immutable consensus projection retains one unresolved disagreement for the recommended campaign item.","artifactIds":["verification-campaign-manifest","verification-item-manifest","verification-event-ledger","verification-consensus","verification-quality-before","verification-quality-after","provider-support-goal-verification"]}],"unavailableEvidence":[],"answer":"Assign the conflicted item to an independent adjudicator and retain the complete dissenting event history.","limitations":["This action addresses a recorded blocker and does not predict a quality, taxonomic, or release outcome."],"artifactIds":["verification-campaign-manifest","verification-item-manifest","verification-event-ledger","verification-consensus","verification-quality-before","verification-quality-after","provider-support-goal-verification"],"externalActionsExecuted":false,"unsupportedClaimsRejected":true,"scientificClaimAllowed":false}
